title: Scroll anchor hook that maintains bottom alignment when near bottom
purpose: Manages scroll position in a container to automatically anchor to the bottom when the user is near the bottom, while allowing manual scrolling up.
module_context: Exports a hook function 'useScrollAnchor' with options for threshold and scroll behavior, and a default export of the same hook.

steps.content: Initialize threshold and behavior from options or use defaults.
Set up state for the scroll container element and near-bottom tracking.
Update the near-bottom reference whenever the state changes.
Create a ref object for the scroll container with getter and setter.
Set up scroll listener to track user's proximity to the bottom.
Set up ResizeObserver to auto-scroll when content grows and user is near bottom.
Create and return an imperative scrollToBottom function.
Calculate the distance from the bottom of the scroll container.
Update the near-bottom state based on whether the distance is within the threshold.
Compare the previous and current scroll heights.
IF content has grown and user is near bottom, scroll to the new bottom.
Update the previous scroll height reference.
Scroll the container to the bottom using the specified behavior.
IF scrolling fails, fall back to setting scrollTop directly.
Update the near-bottom state to true after scrolling.
